response.justification: Bogdan brings genuine technical depth and breadth, with real developer-tooling experience spanning CI/CD infrastructure, test frameworks (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and MCP code generators. However, the role is fundamentally a people management position, and the resume contains zero evidence of direct reports, performance management, 1:1s, or any formal team leadership. This is not a marginal gap — it is the central qualification for the role, and the entire career is individual-contributor-oriented. Without it, he does not meet the stated minimum bar regardless of technical quality.
strengths: Sustained developer-tooling contributions across multiple roles: CI/CD setup at Altom, open-source test framework (Fluent-Asserts) and test runner (Trial), MCP code generators at re:cinq
Broad technical range across backend, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure, demonstrating adaptability to varied engineering contexts
Active community presence through workshops, conference talks, and open-source projects shows capacity to teach, influence, and develop others informally
concerns: No people management experience anywhere in the resume — no direct reports, no mention of hiring, performance reviews, or structured team leadership at any employer
No evidence of strategic roadmap ownership, org-level priority-setting, or leading organizational change initiatives
Mobile platform depth is shallow and incidental; a brief iOS stint at WatchUp does not constitute meaningful background for a role centered on a major mobile platform ecosystem

key_factors.factor: No strategic or organizational leadership experience
